Common.title: DTS Viewer
Common.description: Explore and navigate digital text collections through the DTS (Distributed Text Services) standard. Browse manuscripts, books, and documents with rich metadata and hierarchical citation structures.
Common.formDescription: Enter the URL of the DTS to view the collection.
Common.aboutDescription: DTS Viewer is a web application for exploring and searching text collections through the DTS (Distributed Text Services) API standard.
Common.dtsDescription: DTS (Distributed Text Services) is a specification for exposing collections of texts and their metadata in a RESTful API. This standard enables interoperability between digital text repositories and applications.
Common.feature2: View detailed metadata using Dublin Core standards
Common.gettingStartedDescription: Enter a DTS API endpoint URL in the form on the home page to start exploring text collections.
Common.creator: Creator
Common.subject: Subject
